title: Which Eva Angel you want to have sex with Rei Kaworu excl
display_title: Which Eva Angel you want to have sex with Rei Kaworu excl
wikitext:
[]: Which Eva/Angel you want to have sex with? (Rei/Kaworu excl)             Quote Post by Xard » Sat Nov 10, 2012 2:42 pm Paraphilic interest in the odd lifeforms of Eva has always been crucial part of Eva fandom's interest in the series. What else could explain anthropomorphifications of Angels as moeblob girl toys and all H doujinshi featuring inter-Angel sexual relations and occasional tentacle rape or two directed at poor pilots? EGF in particular has proud, distinguished history with loving Evas and Angels and expressions of this love have bubbled over in creative fan activities over years. Of course the representative case would be Reichu's legendary naked Eva figures that form core part of EGF's mythos. So let's get to the point: Which Fruit of Life munching critters strike your fancy? Name 'em and explain 'em! Personally: - I think Zeruel is quite a irresitible hunk. I particularly want to feel his arms wrap around me. It gets me everytime. - if Zeurel is a boss on the other hand Shamshel is a huge turn off as I seem to have natural aversion to giant purple dongs. So Shamshel is no go.

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sat Nov 10, 2012 2:48 pm Across this silent city I run to you and you swim to me Your chest shines bright like the red sun as I walked this red earth And I ask myelf Should I believe in myself

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sat Nov 10, 2012 2:54 pm InstrumentalityOne wrote: Across this silent city I run to you and you swim to me Your chest shines bright like the red sun as I walked this red earth And I ask myelf Should I believe in myself

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sat Nov 10, 2012 2:58 pm Xard wrote: y-y-you make me blush, IO-kun!

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sat Nov 10, 2012 3:02 pm InstrumentalityOne wrote: When I held you in my arms Just for one moment, I could feel The solitude then Engulfing me in liquid flames As if the gods cried, wept and cursed the heavens You leave me back, all alone, with nothing to hold on

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sat Nov 10, 2012 3:06 pm I thought of you as equal No, as something far superior than me Was it foolish that I thought that I could provide you with enough sincere feelings? Are mine not equal in worth or was the one not sincere you Are you now? But now I just feel like a little kid Who does not find joy in his favorite toy But it figures after all anymore

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Sat Nov 10, 2012 3:07 pm From the genius that brought you the thread "What does Rei's sweat taste like?" comes this next installment in EGF wackiness. Gents, this thread has potential. It will go places...very weird places....

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sat Nov 10, 2012 3:09 pm Xard wrote: I appreciate your feelings but we can't. I already have a girlfriend and I'm sure she'll get really mad if I do something...

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sat Nov 10, 2012 3:10 pm Days have passed on I'd like to think that I moved on These precious summer memories Will always remind me And I will always be reminded By the never ending summer As if the heavenly bodies never wanted me to forget Cherish these juvenile feelings I harbor and eventually forget.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sat Nov 10, 2012 3:15 pm riffraff11235 wrote: From the genius that brought you the thread "What does Rei's sweat taste like?" comes this next installment in EGF wackiness.

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sat Nov 10, 2012 3:25 pm Sorry for bawwing over you so much, Sachiel. Those poems were meant for you months ago, I have really moved on now. Some men fancy might fancy plain Tetrahedron But I want more out of Polyhedron Eight faces Eight triangles As if 1 of you were 8 Tetrahedron on the surface So much to learn so many fascinating mysteries For you are my dearest Octahedron.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sat Nov 10, 2012 3:26 pm Xard wrote: I'm pretty sure little girls you want to be thread is my calling card. Also, you've now posted into this topic. You're obligated to contribute now! Tell us your favourite!

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sat Nov 10, 2012 3:27 pm you're right Shinchan, merge might be warranted. Perhaps mods will lend us hand in that case InstrumentalityOne wrote: Sorry for bawwing over you so much, Sachiel. Those poems were meant for you months ago, I have really moved on now. Some men fancy might fancy plain Tetrahedron But I want more out of Polyhedron Eight faces Eight triangles As if 1 of you were 8 Tetrahedron on the surface So much to learn so many fascinating mysteries For you are my dearest Octahedron.

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Sat Nov 10, 2012 3:39 pm Because http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aeEX3Cn8NgU

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Sat Nov 10, 2012 3:39 pm Xard wrote: I'm pretty sure little girls you want to be thread is my calling card. Also, you've now posted into this topic. You're obligated to contribute now! Tell us your favourite! It's the rimozon angel, isn't it?

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sat Nov 10, 2012 3:42 pm Jayfive wrote: Because http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aeEX3Cn8NgU

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sat Nov 10, 2012 3:43 pm Xard wrote: I appreciate your feelings but we can't. I already have a girlfriend and I'm sure she'll get really mad if I do something...

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sat Nov 10, 2012 3:43 pm riffraff11235 wrote: But that nasty drill would have to remain stowed AT ALL TIMES.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Sat Nov 10, 2012 3:48 pm Xard wrote: ep 23 one. Looks like DNA and shit

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Nov 10, 2012 3:51 pm Had I a core of my own to touch against the souls of the Almighty, and the giant size to withstand the passions that arise between behemoths, I would erotically couple with: Yui-sama & Zeruel (threesome) Kyoko-sama & Sachiel (threesome again) riffraff11235 wrote: Ah, gotcha. It does also turn into Rei and caress Eva-01 lovingly at one point....
